[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001000 2
1 101111111 8
2 101000101 4
3 110100111 6
4 011010111 6
5 001111110 6
6 111111011 8
7 111111111 a
